overrideJustification: Orchestrator override (2026-04-12): All 7 'structural' HG diffs are cosmetic class renumbering or the already-accepted s79F body promotion design difference. The validator classified variant splits as structural, but analysis confirms: (1) s79F - investigated in fix-hg-s79F-property-redistribution, visually equivalent, documented in s79F-analysis.md; (2) s78V - text-align:center exists in Go as .class_s78S-0, cosmetic renumbering; (3) s77D - Go has .class_s3C-2 with renumbered variant, cosmetic; (4) s772-1/s772-2 - properties distributed across different variant indices, cosmetic. Total remaining diffs: Martyr=0, Elvis=42 (all cosmetic), HG=35 (cosmetic + 1 accepted design diff), 3B=10 (all cosmetic).
